switch.selector: send x-ai-profile with a profile name or id bound to the same virtual key

acceptance_checks.name: default_profile_models
acceptance_checks.expected: HTTP 200 object=list and data[].id contains the default profile model

acceptance_checks.name: switched_profile_models
acceptance_checks.expected: HTTP 200 object=list and data[].id differs from the default profile model set

acceptance_checks.name: default_profile_chat_route
acceptance_checks.expected: HTTP 200 chat.completion and request_logs.api_key_profile_id matches the default /v1/models profile_id

acceptance_checks.name: switched_profile_chat_route
acceptance_checks.expected: HTTP 200 chat.completion and request_logs.api_key_profile_id matches the switched /v1/models profile_id

acceptance_checks.name: invalid_profile_rejected
acceptance_checks.request: GET /v1/models and POST /v1/chat/completions with an unbound x-ai-profile

db_preconditions: The same virtual key used by GATEWAY_AUTH_TOKEN has one default active profile binding.
The same virtual key has a second active profile binding addressable by PROFILE_SMOKE_SWITCH_PROFILE or an id/name discoverable from virtual_key_profile_bindings.
The switched profile exposes at least one model that is not visible through the default profile.
Both profile model sets have enabled chat routes to an OpenAI-compatible mock or provider channel.
notes: This fixture is an acceptance contract only. The smoke script does not create or mutate DB rows; prepare the multi-profile data through migrations, control-plane setup, or a separate local seed before running live checks.
